item.title: Club Comedy Seattle — Cheap Laughs Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Club Comedy Seattle, Downtown Seattle

Recurring Wednesday night open mic for comedians at Club Comedy Seattle.

From Club Comedy Seattle — Cheap Laughs Open Mic

item.title: Comic Resistance Agency Pizzeria mic
item.description:
Monday, March 30, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Just the Tap, 90 Blanchard St., Seattle, WA

A comedy game using slides, prompts, and audience voting. Improvised stand-up open mic. No prepared material. FREE to watch or perform. 18\+ See website for more info.

From SEAtoday - Nightlife

Event details

item.title: Dum Top Trivia
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Cuff Complex, 1533 13th Ave, Seattle, WA

Every tuesday @ 7 Pm - with incredible host jeremy behrens! Test your knowledge, learn something new and hang with us on this fine tuesday you dum dums! Doors @ 6PM Team Check-Ins @ 6:30PM Trivia begins @ 7PM

From SEAtoday - Nightlife

Event details
